scripts.dev:worker: node ../../scripts/run-backend-python.mjs -m celery --app app.worker.celery_app worker --loglevel info --concurrency 1 --pool solo
scripts.format: node ../../scripts/run-backend-python.mjs -m ruff check --fix app tests && node ../../scripts/run-backend-python.mjs -m black app tests
scripts.lint: node ../../scripts/run-backend-python.mjs -m ruff check app tests && node ../../scripts/run-backend-python.mjs -m black --check app tests
